summary: Tested pricing unit feature (per-unit vs per-m² pricing). Backend API working correctly. Admin UI pricing unit modal working correctly. Shop frontend displays correct pricing labels.
critical_code_review_comments: Dialog accessibility warnings: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' - Should add aria-describedby to modals for accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: Updated TestSupplier TEST-UNIFIED-002 product to use unit pricing for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing unit feature fully tested. Backend endpoint PUT /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-pricing-unit works correctly with validation. Admin UI shows Pricing Unit section in Bulk Category Editor modal with Configure button. Per Unit option shows optional Unit Price input. Shop frontend TileDetailPage correctly displays /m² or /unit labels based on pricing_unit field.

admin_ui.supplier_products_page: PASSED - Page loads with Edit Categories button
admin_ui.pricing_unit_section: PASSED - Section visible in Bulk Category Editor modal
admin_ui.pricing_unit_modal: PASSED - Shows Per m² and Per Unit options
admin_ui.unit_price_input: PASSED - Optional Unit Price input appears when Per Unit selected
admin_ui.save_button: PASSED - 'Save for X Products' button functional

shop_ui.tile_detail_page: PASSED - Shows correct pricing unit labels and Quantity (m²) label

features_verified: Backend: PUT /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-pricing-unit endpoint accepts products array, pricing_unit (m2 or unit), and optional unit_price
Backend: Endpoint validates pricing_unit is 'm2' or 'unit' (returns 400 for invalid values)
Backend: Endpoint updates supplier_products and tiles collections with pricing_unit field
Frontend (Admin): Pricing Unit section visible in Edit Categories modal with Configure button
Frontend (Admin): Pricing Unit Settings modal shows Per m² (tiles) and Per Unit (adhesive, grout, tools) options
Frontend (Admin): Per Unit selection shows optional Unit Price input field
Frontend (Admin): Save button correctly calls backend API
Frontend (Shop): TileDetailPage displays /m² label for m²-based products
Frontend (Shop): Quantity label shows 'Quantity (m²):' for m²-based products
